name: Acrylic Desk Drawer Organizer Clear - Brightroom™: Office & Stationery Holder, 20% Recycled Plastic, 12"x8"x4"
description:
Keep your office essentials neatly arranged with this Acrylic Desk Drawer Organizer from Brightroom™. This set includes six drawer organizers in a clear acrylic finish. These multifunctional drawer storage compartments easily accommodate smaller notepads, pens, scotch tape holder and other stationery items. They're also stackable and can be used separately in a variety of ways.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
